Your Workspace,Reimagined

Premium coworking spaces with private offices, dedicated desks & meeting rooms. Experience flexible workspace solutions designed for productivity and growth.

Our Workspace Solutions

Flexible office space and workspace solutions tailored for startups, freelancers, and businesses

Private Offices

Fully furnished private office spaces for teams of all sizes with 24/7 access and premium amenities.

Meeting Rooms

Professional meeting rooms equipped with the latest technology for presentations and collaborations.

Dedicated Desks

Your own dedicated desk in our vibrant coworking community with all the amenities you need.

Hot Desks

Flexible hot desk workspace solutions perfect for freelancers and remote workers.

Managed Office

Fully managed office solutions with complete setup, maintenance, and premium services.

Flexible Pricing Plans

Choose the perfect plan for your work style and budget

Day Pass

₹249/day

Perfect for occasional visits and trial days

  • Flexible seating
  • High-speed WiFi
  • Complimentary beverages
  • Access during business hours
  • Community events

Hot Desk

₹3,999/month

Perfect for freelancers and remote workers

  • Flexible seating
  • High-speed WiFi
  • Complimentary beverages
  • Access during business hours
  • Community events
Most Popular

Dedicated Desk

₹5,999/month

Your own space in a shared environment

  • Personal desk
  • 24/7 access
  • High-speed WiFi
  • Complimentary beverages
  • Storage locker
  • Mail handling
  • Community events

Small Cabin

₹20,000/month

Perfect private space for small teams (4 persons)

  • Fully furnished cabin
  • Capacity for 4 people
  • 24/7 access
  • High-speed WiFi
  • Storage space
  • Mail handling
  • Community events

Private Office

₹24,999/month

Exclusive space for your team (6 persons)

  • Fully furnished office
  • Capacity for 6 people
  • 24/7 access
  • High-speed WiFi
  • Meeting room credits
  • Storage space
  • Mail handling
  • Customizable setup
